_description: Fire immediately when any regulatory source emits a HIGH severity safety alert about a supplement.
Alert when any ingredient's 7-day signal count exceeds 2x its 30-day daily average (potential emerging issue).

rule_name: Omega-3 and Vitamin D competitor signals
_description: Track competitor activity and regulatory signals for key omega-3 and Vitamin D product lines.
Alert when any ingredient's sentiment score shifts >0.3 toward negative over 14 days (rising risk).
Alert when an ingredient's signal profile shifts from efficacy/benefit claims toward safety concerns.
Notify as soon as any new TGA consultation is published, regardless of ingredient.

rule_name: Adverse event cluster — high trend relevance
_description: Alert when adverse event signals show high trend relevance, indicating a possible emerging safety signal.
